description: Strategic homework for the brand owner. The Strategist reviews progress, assigns the next step, and runs the AI action for any item where one is available. Items with ai_doable=true can be drafted by AI; items with ai_doable=false require the owner's lived input (interview, decision, real conversation).

items.title: Complete Current Business Status Worksheet
items.owner_action: Open Current-Business-Status-Worksheet, fill in honestly. Owner-only — this is real numbers and real situation.
items.notes: Foundation for everything that follows. AI cannot fabricate this.

items.title: Submit Niche Clarity Workbook
items.owner_action: Review the AI draft, edit until it sounds like you, then submit.
items.notes: AI drafts from brand.json + a short interview. Owner approves.

items.title: Define niche & validate demand
items.owner_action: Review demand evidence, decide go/no-go on niche.
items.notes: AI runs market signal analysis (search trends, LinkedIn job titles, competitor scan).

items.title: Craft UVP 1-liner + 3 proof bullets
items.owner_action: Pick favorite, refine wording, paste into brand.json -> positioning.uvp.
items.notes: AI generates 5 UVP options + proof bullets in brand voice.

items.title: Complete Audience Insights Matrix
items.owner_action: Validate AI draft against your real client conversations. Edit anything that doesn't match what you actually hear.
items.notes: AI drafts a who/pain/desire/objection/language matrix from brand.json + audience block.

items.title: Create 3-5 core message angles
items.owner_action: Pick 3-5 that ring true. AI uses these as content pillars for /weekly-content.
items.notes: AI generates 8 angles, owner narrows to 3-5.

items.title: Build one-pager explaining offer
items.owner_action: Review, edit if needed, send to first prospect.
items.notes: Already has a script — build_pitch.py one-pager.

items.title: Send 20+ warm outreach messages
items.owner_action: Review each draft, personalize the opener, send from your account.
items.notes: AI drafts personalized openers from a contact list. Owner sends — no automation of the actual send.

items.title: Set up lead tracker & book calls
items.owner_action: Add each warm contact: python scripts/manage_leads.py add --name ... etc.
items.notes: Tracker already exists — manage_leads.py. AI can populate from a CSV.

items.title: Develop offer doc (scope, pricing, deliverables)
items.owner_action: Set real prices and timelines. AI structures, owner decides numbers.
items.notes: AI drafts structure from brand.json -> offers. Owner fills in actual prices.

items.title: Define proprietary method (visuals + bullets)
items.owner_action: AI proposes a 3-5 step method based on how you actually work. Owner refines.
items.notes: Outputs a method diagram brief — hand off to The Visual Artist for the diagram.

items.title: Update LinkedIn profile & 30s pitch
items.owner_action: Paste headline + about into LinkedIn. Practice the 30s pitch out loud.
items.notes: AI drafts headline, about, and a 30-second spoken pitch in brand voice.

items.title: Create lead magnet and case study
items.owner_action: Pick which case study to feature, AI structures the writeup.
items.notes: Lead magnet draft + case study template. Real client details require owner.

items.title: Build Dream 100 list & outreach templates
items.owner_action: Review the 100, mark which to actually pursue. AI drafts 3 template variations per persona.
items.notes: AI generates target persona profiles + 3 outreach template variants.

items.title: Map MVME, weekly calendar, follow-up checklist
items.owner_action: Review proposed weekly cadence, adjust to your real calendar, commit to it.
items.notes: AI proposes a weekly content + outreach + follow-up cadence based on offers and pillars.
